# Processed Data

## File: `cleaned_survey_2025.csv`

Cleaned and filtered subset of the 2025 Stack Overflow Developer Survey, prepared for the 
Pakistan vs. Rest-of-World compensation analysis. Generated by `notebooks/01_data_cleaning.ipynb`.

**Do not edit this file manually.** To regenerate it, re-run `01_data_cleaning.ipynb` against 
the raw survey file (see `data/raw/README.md` for the source download).

## Derivation Summary

Starting from the raw survey (48,882 rows), the following filters were applied in order:

| Step | Filter | Rows remaining |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Raw data | 48,882 |
| 2 | Non-null `Country`, `ConvertedCompYearly`, `YearsCode` | 23,838 |
| 3 | `ConvertedCompYearly` between $1,000–$2,000,000 (outlier removal) | 23,112 |
| 4 | `YearsCode` ≤ 50 (removes likely-censored "50+ years" sentinel values) | 23,036 |

Final composition: **112 Pakistan respondents, 22,924 Rest-of-World respondents.**

## Key Columns

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `Country` | Respondent's reported country (raw survey value) |
| `CountryGroup` | Derived: `"Pakistan"` or `"Rest of World"` |
| `ConvertedCompYearly` | Annual compensation, converted to USD by Stack Overflow |
| `YearsCode` | Total years respondent has coded (any context, not just professional) |
| `LogComp` | `log(ConvertedCompYearly)` — used for hypothesis testing and regression due to right-skew |
| `ExpBand` | Derived experience bucket: 0-5, 5-10, 10-15, 15-25, 25+ years |

(Full column list matches the raw survey schema for all other fields — only the above were 
added or specifically relied upon in this analysis.)

## Known Limitations of This Dataset

- **Salary non-response bias:** ~51% of all respondents did not report compensation. Within 
  Pakistan, respondents who reported salary have higher median experience (7 years) than those 
  who didn't (5.5 years) — suggesting the final Pakistan sample likely skews toward more senior/
  experienced individuals than the true underlying respondent population.
- **Small Pakistan sample in senior experience bands:** 15-25 years (n=7) and 25+ years (n=5) 
  bands have very few Pakistan respondents; findings in these bands should be treated as 
  directional, not statistically reliable.
- **Nominal USD, not purchasing-power-adjusted:** `ConvertedCompYearly` reflects nominal exchange-
  rate conversion, not cost-of-living or purchasing power parity.
- **Self-selected survey population:** Stack Overflow respondents are not representative of the 
  broader tech workforce in either Pakistan or globally.

See `reports/pay_equity_report.md` for full methodology and findings.
